details.test: Task 1: Adjust retirement contribution rate to at least 8%
Task 2: Move all retirement assets into lowest-cost target-date fund under 0.50%
Task 3: Ensure spouse 70% and child Alex 30% beneficiaries
Task 4: Enroll in cheaper of Silver HMO vs Gold PPO with estimated annual cost under 5000
Task 5: Mark as favorite the low-risk fund (risk <=3) with highest 1-year return
Task 6: Use retirement calculator to reach projected balance between 500k and 520k and apply to plan
Task 7: Update contact details and set communication preference to email_only
Task 8: Download previous year's annual pension statement as PDF
Task 9: Set up automatic 1% yearly contribution increase until reaching 12% in January
